brief_notes: Well-designed within-subject fMRI study with strong manipulation checks. Tables include detailed participant demographics, comprehensive control measures with F-statistics and effect sizes (partial eta-squared with 90% CIs), thalamic activation analysis with both whole-brain and ROI results, NAcc null result with permutation confirmation, and PPI connectivity analysis. The double dissociation between thalamus and striatum is compellingly presented. Power analysis is included. Limitations section is honest about sample size and missing conditions.
